name: Raspberry Glace (Dinner Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz. package cream cheese, rolled into balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the hot water over the Jello and stir until dissolved.
2. Add the cold water.
3. Form small balls of the cream cheese and roll them in chopped nuts.
4. Place the balls in a 9-inch ring mold.
5. Pour the cooled raspberry Jello into the mold and add the raspberries to the mixture.
6. Chill until the Jello is set.
7. Unmold onto serving plates.
8. Garnish with lettuce and large, perfect raspberries.
9. Top with mayonnaise mixed with whipped cream.
